description: Perform a domain-level sender audit on the current Inbox (50 emails) and Junk folder (20 emails) to categorize sender domains and provide security recommendations. Create an IMAP folder named 'Trusted-Senders' and move at least 8 legitimate emails into it. Create another IMAP folder named 'Blocklist-Candidates' and move at least 5 suspicious or spam emails into it from either the Junk or Inbox folders. Send an email to 'it-security@company.com' with the subject 'Sender Domain Blocklist Recommendation' containing at least 2 specific sender domains found, a numeric statistic (such as the count of spam emails), and a clear security recommendation using terms like 'blocklist' or 'allowlist'. Login credentials: ga / password123
